title: PARLIAMENT QUESTION: POSTS FILLED THROUGH LATERAL ENTRY
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances & Pensions

PARLIAMENT QUESTION: POSTS FILLED THROUGH LATERAL ENTRY

Posted On:
18 MAR 2026 3:40PM by PIB Delhi

So far 63 appointments have been made at the level of Joint Secretary/ Director/Deputy Secretary on contract/deputation basis into various Government Departments through lateral entry since 2018. A statement indicating name, year-wise & Ministries/Department-wise appointment is at
Annexure
. These appointments have been made for specific assignments, keeping in view their specialized knowledge and expertise in the domain area. Since, each of these appointments has been made against single post cadre, and accordingly in view of the Hon’ble Supreme Court judgement in the case titled ‘
PGIMER, Chandigarh Vs. Faculty Association and Ors’
category wise data of the appointed officers has not been maintained.



Annexure

List of candidates recruited by Lateral Entry in year 2019 (Total-8):

Ministry/ Department

1

Joint Secretary-1

This information was given by Union Minister of State (Independent Charge) for Science & Technology and Earth Sciences, and Minister of State in the Prime Minister’s Office, Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions, Atomic Energy and Space, Dr. Jitendra Singh, in a written reply in the Lok Sabha on Wednesday.

*****

NKR/AV

(Release ID: 2241739)

Visitor Counter : 35
